answer: Hey 👋 I'm Pierpaolo. Ask me anything — try "what's your tech stack?", "are you available for work?", or "how do I reach you?".

I'm Pierpaolo Wurzburger, a Full-Stack Web Developer based in Naples, Italy. I fell in love with computers at 12 (Windows XP, the family PC) and never looked back. I design and build scalable software solutions — from landing pages to e-commerce platforms — helping businesses and professionals level up their digital presence.

Born in Naples in 1991. Got hooked on computing at age 12 with Windows XP. Over the years I went from tinkering to building real projects for real clients. These days I focus on full-stack web development with an emphasis on performance, accessibility, and SEO — always keeping clients involved through an Agile process.

HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Vue.js, PHP, Laravel, SQL/MySQL, Git, WordPress, and everything around SEO, performance optimization, and accessibility. I pick the right tool for the job — sometimes it's a custom Laravel app, sometimes it's a finely-tuned WordPress site.

Landing pages, e-commerce, blogs, WordPress sites, SEO optimization, performance & accessibility audits, and full-stack custom web apps. I also provide ongoing assistance — you'll always know where your project stands.
Vue.js is one of my go-to frameworks for interactive front-ends. I use the Composition API with modern tooling. It's clean, performant, and a joy to work with.

PHP and Laravel are my backend staples. I've built rental management apps, custom CMS solutions, and API-driven backends with them. Solid, battle-tested, and great for projects that need real server-side logic.

I work with WordPress daily — from setting up existing installs to building custom themes and blogs from scratch. I make sure everything is optimized for performance, SEO, and accessibility. You'll also be fully autonomous in managing your content after delivery.

E-commerce is where local businesses go global. I build online stores that are fast, accessible, and optimized for conversions. Whether it's WooCommerce or a custom solution, I handle the full pipeline.

I aim for a perfect 100 on PageSpeed Insights and apply all SEO best practices so your site gets indexed properly by Google. It's not just about keywords — it's about structure, performance, and accessibility working together.
I take on selective projects — especially around web development, SEO, and e-commerce. Send a brief description of what you need to info@themillennials.it and I'll let you know if it's a fit.

It depends on the scope. Send me a quick description of what you're trying to build at info@themillennials.it and I'll come back with a number. I believe in transparent pricing and keeping you involved at every step.
Naples, Italy — born and raised. I work remotely and collaborate with clients across time zones. The espresso here is unbeatable, by the way.
Best route is email: info@themillennials.it. You can also find me on GitHub (github.com/PierW), YouTube (youtube.com/@PierDev), X (@PierpaoloW), or LinkedIn.
My YouTube channel is @PierDev — I share tutorials and insights around web development. Check it out at youtube.com/@PierDev.
All my public work is at github.com/PierW. You'll find projects like boolzapp (WhatsApp replica), boolflix (Netflix replica), and BoolBnB (rental management app) among others.
Currently building something top secret from home. I'll share details when the time is right — stay tuned.

Start by building something small end-to-end. Pick one technology — HTML/CSS/JS is the perfect foundation — and make a real page. Don't just watch tutorials; build, break, fix, repeat. And never stop being curious.
I still remember the sound of the Windows XP startup like it was yesterday. Outside the laptop: Naples, good food, and the occasional retro gaming session.

Clients consistently mention two things: transparency and results. Ilenia (Brown Cafè) called me "professional and always available." Luisa said she's now fully autonomous managing her blog content. Gigi (Trivio Bistrot) switched to me after a bad agency experience and hasn't looked back.
